title: [HWMemSimImpl] Generating slice syntax for no reason

features.name: unpacked array element access with full-range slice as lvalue
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of packed-type elements where an array element access is wrapped in a slice operation that spans the entire packed dimension

features.name: array slice of entire packed array dimension
features.description: Code should include a slice operation applied to an unpacked array element where the slice covers the complete packed array range
